title: prompt.rs magic capacity constants 12288 and 4096 lack documentation
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Cognitive Readability. Location: src/prompt.rs:133 and 158. Violation: Both String::with_capacity values are magic numbers with no comment explaining derivation. Mandated Refactor: Extract as const PREFIX_CAPACITY_BYTES: usize = 12 * 1024 and SUFFIX_CAPACITY_BYTES: usize = 4 * 1024 at module level with doc comments.
